## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content production, performance updates, and content strategy refinements.](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [31 articles ready for review; on track for 8 this week](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Slight drop in overall and non-branded sessions, likely seasonal](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Need to refine content approach: stick closer to Rapyd's capabilities, create more targeted audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Plan to develop 4-5 new audience personas to guide content creation](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Performance Update

  - [31 articles ready for review on Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Slight drop in overall sessions and non-branded sessions from last week's peak](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Cross-border payments cluster lost some traffic, mainly from Payment Trends article](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Other clusters (compliance, payment infrastructure, processing) held steady](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [LLM referrals: GPT and Perplexity remain major sources; Gemini referrals increased](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Content Refinement Strategies

  - [Need to clarify process for updating existing posts vs. creating new ones](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Remove mentions of "intelligent routing" from content as it doesn't align with Rapyd's offerings](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Ensure content stays within Rapyd's actual capabilities by referencing Rapyd's documentation](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Develop more specific audience personas to better target content](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

### Audience Persona Development

  - [Current composite persona (professional in payment ops) is too broad](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [Plan to create 4-5 new personas:](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
    1.  General catch-all (refined version of current)
    2.  iGaming, Forex, online trading
    3.  Crypto
    4.  ISO payfac
    5.  Gateway/orchestrator tech bundle
  - [GrowthX to provide a template for creating detailed audience personas](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)

### SEO Considerations for New Personas

  - [Evaluate if SEO is the right channel for targeting specific personas (e.g., integration partners)](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [Consider creating sales enablement content for personas less likely to use search engines](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)

### Content Localization

  - [Occasional inconsistencies in using British vs. American English](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Team to double-check and maintain consistency in British English usage](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1478.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send audience persona template to Rapyd team](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Rapyd to create 4-5 new audience personas using the provided template](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=789.0)
  - [Schedule social strategy discussion with Ari (Mara to coordinate)](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Rapyd to share competitor information deck with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Continue refining content to align closely with Rapyd's capabilities and target audiences](https://fathom.video/share/zN4S-2zgxSzr4EDsLsYfmjVxu5VQzzGY?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
